entry.title: Question Regarding Allocation from Cost Center to Internal Order in Fiori App F3338
entry.content:
Hi there,

Any help on the following?

Objective:

I would like to use the allocation functionality of the SAP S/4HANA Fiori app F3338 to perform allocations from cost centers to internal orders.

However, we are currently unable to select internal orders as receiver cost objects in the app. Only limited types of cost objects appear to be available as allocation receivers.

Could you please advise whether this behavior is a standard system limitation by design?
If so, does this mean that allocations from cost centers to internal orders must be executed via the SAP GUI instead of Fiori?

Alternatively, if this is not a design limitation, could you let us know whether there are any missing settings or prerequisites required to enable internal orders as receivers in Fiori app F3338?

Thank you very much for your support.

Best regards,

dai

entry.title: Fiscal Year Variant Change from 4-4-5 to Calendar Year
entry.content:
Many companies in retail use the 4‑4‑5 fiscal calendar for their financial closing. But sometimes the business decides to move to a calendar year (K4) instead. Changing the fiscal year variant in SAP sounds simple, but it comes with important restrictions and risks.

Why SAP Blocks the Change

SAP puts a hard stop error when you try to change the fiscal year variant if any transactions already exist in the company code. This is because changing the fiscal year structure after postings have happened can create serious issues, such as:

  • Data inconsistency in financial postings

  • Wrong period determination for documents

  • Open items not matching correctly

  • Reporting mismatches across modules

  • Integration failures with connected systems

  • System performance issues during period close

  • Historical data becoming confusing or incorrect

Because of these risks, SAP does not recommend changing the fiscal year variant directly in a live system.

Possible Solutions

There are three ways to handle this situation:

Option 1: Contact SAP Consulting

SAP’s expert team can analyze your system and suggest the safest approach. This is the most controlled option but may take time and cost money.

Option 2: Shorten the Current Fiscal Year

You can “short end” the current fiscal year, create a new fiscal year variant based on the calendar year, and assign it to the company code. This approach is more complex and may not fit all business scenarios.

Option 3: Change the Variant from 4‑4‑5 to K4 and Test End‑to‑End

This is the most practical option for this scenario. You change the fiscal year variant directly and then perform full testing to ensure nothing breaks.

We will proceed with Option 3.

How to Change the Fiscal Year Variant

  1. Go to OB37 and try to change the fiscal year variant assignment.

     

     

  2. You will see this error message: “Check if postings already exist in Co.Code XXXX / Ledger 0L!”

     

     

    This is SAP’s hard stop.

  3. To continue, convert this error into a warning:

    • SPRO → Financial Accounting → Financial Accounting Global Settings → Tools → Change Message Control

    • Application Area: FINS_ACDOC_CUST

    • Message Number: 116

    • Change it from Error to Warning

    •  

       

  4. After this change, SAP will allow you to update the fiscal year variant.

    Important Reminder

    Changing the fiscal year variant is a high‑risk activity. Before and after the change, make sure to:

    • Test all end‑to‑end business processes

    • Validate all integrations (especially external systems)

    • Check for any data inconsistencies

    • Confirm that reporting works correctly

    • Ensure no postings behave differently

    Only move forward once everything is fully tested and approved.

entry.title: Anlagenbuchhaltung Restbuchwert von 1 Cent in der Anlage
entry.content:
in der Anlagenbuchhaltung ist folgender Sachverhalt aufgetreten. 
Eine Anlage mit Anschaffungswert 1950,01 Euro wurde über 10 Jahre abgeschrieben. Die Afa betrug jährlich 195,00 Euro. Mit dem 31.12.2024 wäre die Anlage in voller Höhe abgeschrieben gewesen. 
Afa-Beginn war der 01.01.2015. Allerdings wird jetzt ein Restbuchwert von 1 Cent auf der Anlage ausgewiesen, was eigentlich nicht sein sollte. Ein Erinnerungswert (von 1 Cent) ist für die Anlagenklasse nicht hinterlegt. Für das neue GJ 2025 wird auch keine keine weitere Afa-Buchung für den Abschreibungslauf ausgewiesen. Eigentlich hätte im Afa-Lauf 12/2024 im letzten Monat ein Betrag 16,01 Euro als Abschreibungswert gebucht werden müssen. Es wurden aber nur 16,00 Euro gebucht. 

Eine mögliche Ursache könnte hierfür in den Einstellungen zum Abschreibungsschlüssel und hier speziell zu den Rundungsregeln liegen. 

Bei einer anderen Anlage wird ein Betrag von 3,12 Euro als Abschreibung im letzten Afa-Lauf entsprechend ausgewiesen. Siehe Dokumentation. 

Ich bitte zu prüfen, wo hier die möglich Fehlerursache liegt, denn eigentlich hätte die Anlage keinen Restbuchwert mehr ausweisen dürfen.

Aufgrund des Jahresabschlusses und der anstehenden Prüfung der Jahresrechnung, sollte zumindest die Fehlerursache bekannt sein, daher bitte ich um eine zeitnahe Prüfung. Danke.

entry.title: Depreciation time is shortened after changing asset master
entry.content:
I executed test scenario as below:

AUC Creation
  • Step 1: KO01ーCreate Internal Order
  • Step 2: FV60 – Post vendor invoice
  • Step 3: KO88 – Settlement
Final Asset Transfer
  • Step 4: AS01 – Create final asset
  • Step 5: KO02 – Maintain Settlement Rule (Assign Final Asset Number)
  • Step 6: KO88 – Settlement (AUC → Final Asset)
  • Step 7: AS03 – Display Asset
  • Step 8: AW01N－Display Asset Explorer
Asset Impairment
  • Step 9: ABAWLーTransfer Impairment Amount to Asset
  • Step 10: AS02ーChange Asset Master Data

           Maintain country-specific impairment data in asset master

           Create a new time-dependent interval in the depreciation area using new depreciation parameters
            Refer to SAP Note 951312
  • Step 11: AFABーPosting of impairment amount to asset
  • Step 12: AW01N－Display Asset Explorer (Compairisons Tab)

After checking planned depreciation in AW01N, I found that the base value used to calculate planned depreciation does not deduct the impairment amount. As a result, the annual depreciation amount is calculated higher than it should be, causing depreciation to be completed earlier than planned. 

Do you know the reason why it is like that? 

Is there anything special about assets transferred from AuC? Because when I tested with an asset acquired directly via T-code ABZON, this issue did not occur.

For more information, refer the images below

Depreciation before impairment

Step 8: AW01N－Display Asset Explorer

Depreciation time is from 2025 to 2040

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Asset Impairment

Step 10: AS02　ーChange Asset Master Data

 

Step 12: AW01N－Display Asset Explorer 

Depreciation time is shortened, from 2025 to 2033 instead of 2025 to 2040 as above.

entry.title: Inter-company billing transfer IDOC issue(about enhance)
entry.content:
Hi All,

When we initiate an inter-company billing, the corresponding IDOC is automatically forwarded.

Now we need to set up accounting on IDOC.

The line that originally had EWLNR='*' set in OBCB, the account assignment is 51110090.

Now, a new line EWLNR='99890007' has been added, with the account assignment 70100001.

However, because one subject represents costs and the other revenue, the screen configurations are different.

This causes the following error in IDOC. Because our system's revenue category does not have a quantity field.

Is there an enhancement that allows removing the quantity on the IDOC before the throw?

Are there any other suggested approaches?

 

If anything above is unclear, please feel free to ask further questions. 

Thanks All !

entry.title: Field Value is not showing in form 0SAPBLNCE-01 of Report S_PL0_86000030
entry.content:
I have added field cost center in characteristics tab in From 0SAPBLNCE-01 using tcode FGI2. But when execute report S_PL0_86000030, it's shows only cost center description not it's value.

Any one can guide how to add field in 0SAPBLNCE-01 so it's it's actual value with description like other fields e.g. profit center ?

entry.title: added field in S_PL0_86000030 but only description available
entry.content:
I have added field cost center in form 0SAPBLNCE-01 using T-Code FGI2, but in output it's shows only cost center description not it's value.

Please guide on the same.

entry.title: F.08 tcode Foreign Currency Balances Return Zero in F.08 After S/4HANA 1809 → SP04/2023 Upgrade
entry.content: Hello After upgrading the S/4HANA system from release 1809 to SP04/2023, during the execution of F.08 Foreign Currency Valuation, local currency (TRY) balances are calculated correctly, however foreign currency (FC / YBP) balances are returned as zero, even though the “Foreign Currency Amount” option is selected on the F.08 selection screen. In the previous 1809 system, the same configuration, accounts, and documents produced correct foreign currency valuation results. In the upgraded system, no error message is displayed, but foreign currency valuation lines are not generated at all

entry.title: F.08 tcode Foreign Currency Balances Return Zero in F.08 After S/4HANA 1809 → SP04/2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello After upgrading the S/4HANA system from release 1809 to SP04/2023, during the execution of F.08 Foreign Currency Valuation, local currency (TRY) balances are calculated correctly, however foreign currency (FC / YBP) balances are returned as zero, even though the “Foreign Currency Amount” option is selected on the F.08 selection screen. In the previous 1809 system, the same configuration, accounts, and documents produced correct foreign currency valuation results. In the upgraded system, no error

message is displayed, but foreign currency valuation lines are not generated at all

“It is working normally in the system before the transition.”

entry.title: 3451944 - FI PL : KSeF number enablement for MIRO postings in ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Question regarding SAP-Note 3451944.

Has anyone implemented the note? If yes, could you tell me if its working in your system.

I have followed the instructions in the note but Ksef-number gets cleared or disappears, whenever i enter it in MIRO.

Thank you

entry.title: ZZ field upload in the journal entries app is not populated the backend
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA On-Premise implementation and I am facing an issue with a custom ZZ field in the Journal Entry upload process.

Context

  • I have a custom ZZ field created in the CI_COBL extension.

  • According to SAP notes, this field needs to be published so it can be used in the Upload Journal Entries Fiori app.

  • I exposed and published the field as a Key User Custom Field extension in the Coding Block using transaction SCFD_EUI.

  • The S_ATO_SETUP was already configured.

Configuration Done

The field has been published and activated in the following apps and objects:

  • Journal Entry Item

  • FINS Substitution / Validation – Journal Entry Item

  • Manage Journal Entries

  • Post General Journal Entries

  • Target structure for field mapping

  • All OData and SOAP services related to FINS_CODING_BLOCK

Observed Behavior

  • The field is correctly published.

  • When I open the Upload Journal Entries app and download the Excel template, the custom field (ZZUEN) is present in the template.

  • However, when I fill the ZZUEN field in the template and upload it:

    • The journal entry is successfully posted.

    • The ZZUEN value is not populated in the corresponding ZZ field in ACDOCA.

Debugging and Analysis

  • I activated BADI_FINS_ACDOC_POSTING_EVENTS and implemented debugging logic to intercept the posting process.

  • The ZZ field exists in ACDOCA and is visible in the item structures passed to the BAdI methods.

  • However, the original frontend field (ZZ_1* field from the Excel / UI) is not available in the interface structures, so I cannot perform the mapping.

  • It seems the value is lost before reaching the posting BAdI.

Question

The process appears straightforward: expose the field via Custom Fields, activate it in the UI and services, and use it in the Upload Journal Entries app. While the field is technically available and visible in the template, it is not mapped to the backend ZZ field during posting.

  • Is there a specific BAdI or enhancement spot responsible for mapping custom fields from the XLSX layout to the backend coding block?

  • Is there any additional configuration required to ensure the custom field value is transferred from the Upload Journal Entries app to ACDOCA?

Any hints or guidance to resolve this issue would be highly appreciated.

Kind regards,
Francisco

entry.title: Purchase Functionality is not working (Purchase and offsetting accounts in GRN)
entry.content:
Dear SAPians,

We are facing an issue with the purchase functionality in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

We have maintained the transaction keys EIN and EKG in Automatic Account Determination for GRN postings (purchase account and offsetting account). However, despite maintaining these entries, the system is not generating the corresponding accounting entries during GRN.

Could you please advise if we are missing any configuration, or if there are any additional settings that need to be checked in S/4HANA Cloud?

#SAP Invoice and Goods Receipt Reconciliation #Sourcing and Procurement - Purchase Contract Management #SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement #FIN (Finance) #SAP Fiori Cloud 

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: 3451944 - FI PL : KSeF number enablement for MIRO postings in ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Question regarding SAP-Note 3451944.

The field is displayed in Miro, but is there a way to display it in MIR4 as well?

Regards,

Kamil

entry.title: Posting Period Set Wrongly
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My team has wrongly set the posting date of period 2025-12 to be from 01.12.25 to 31.01.26, instead of 01.12.25 to 31.12.25 and create new periods for 2026. Transactions in Jan 2026 have been made.

How is this going to affect closing for 2025.
Is there a way to correct the posting period and the transactions that are already made?

Thank you!

entry.title: New program: Auth Object Requirements
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am working on FSD where a new program is been planned to be developed. There is question on Auth Object section in security requirements. 

As functional consultant, how to provide Auth objects details.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: MIRO posting for Demurrage condition (ZA90) posting to inventory instead of Demurrage G/L
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need guidance on MIRO posting behavior for a demurrage condition.

In MIRO, the demurrage condition ZA90 shows an amount of PKR 1,945,979 at invoice level. However, when we open the Follow-On Accounting Document, the posting to the Demurrage G/L 521030135 is only PKR 1.11, while the remaining amount is absorbed into inventory and material price difference accounts.

Observations:

Condition type: ZA90 – Demurrages

G/L mapped to ZA90: 521030135 (Demurrages)

MIRO shows full demurrage amount

FI document shows:

Very small amount (1.11) on Demurrage G/L

Majority of the value posted to:

RM – Excipient

Material Price Difference

GIT / Inventory-related accounts

Issue / Question:
Why is SAP capitalizing the demurrage amount into inventory instead of expensing it fully to the Demurrage G/L, even though the G/L is correctly mapped?



Please review the attached screenshots.

entry.title: Ayuda en uso de Tx ABZU
entry.content: Por necesidades contables necesitan modificar el valor de las amortizaciones de un activo a cierta fecha. Si valen 600,000 ahora necesitan valga 100,000. Me dice mi compañero de activos que para eso sirve esta tx ABZU. Tenemos un manual de uso pero es muy basico, alguien tendra algun documento o guia mas detallada?

entry.title: How to find the app Manage Tax Items for Legal Reporting (ID: F3172) ?
entry.content:
The app Manage Tax Items for Legal Reporting (ID: F3172) is not visible in the Fiori Launchpad search.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Event based Revenue Recognition for service dokuments 3M3
entry.content:
Hello dear proffessionals, 

we use the 3M3 for service Documents. The customer wants to change the correction account into the revenue account of origin, in order to have a better overview, when the posting is done after a run. 

So like....Revenue Account is 40000009 then for correction the system should take the same account to book the accruals against. 

Where can we maintain this change in the System? 

 

Thank you in advance. 

BR

Manuel

entry.title: Setting up Currency Exchange Rate API in Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hi,
I am setting up the Currency Exchange Rate API (Overview | Currency Exchange Rate | SAP Business Accelerator Hub) using the communication scenario SAP_COM_0B18 on an S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition system. I want to configure this service with an OAuth2.0 authentication (Authentication Code + PKCE). For testing I would have liked to create a GET request to the service URL using Postman. However I always get the error:

The requested OAuth 2.0 scope cannot be granted because it is either not assigned to the current user or to the OAuth 2.0 client. See SAP troubleshooting note 1688545.

I have checked the mentioned SAP troubleshooting note but this specific error is not mentioned there. When looking into the app "Display Connectivity Trace", the only information that i get is the following:


I have further checked that my business user has the correct role for the scope OV4:API_CURRENCYEXCHANGERATE (SAP_FIN_BC_CA_CURR_PC) according to the information in the Communication Arrangement:

This is the token request in Postman:

And the Callback URL is defined accordingly in the Communication System:

What am I missing?

Thanks in advance!
